name: Frontend Studio
description: Professional browser-based frontend IDE — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SVG, JSON, Markdown and more. Monaco editor, live preview, project management, AI assistant, extensions, themes, and command palette. The complete frontend development environment in your browser.
author: Shamrouz Awan
